'''lalatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamang|zamang]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamang|zamang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lalatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lælæthæth|lælæthæth]] || [[word:lælæthæj|lælæthæj]] || [[word:lælæthæsh|lælæthæsh]] || [[word:lælæthæ|lælæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lalalathath|lalalathath]] || [[word:lalalathaj|lalalathaj]] || [[word:lalalathash|lalalathash]] || [[word:lalalatha|lalalatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lalathath|lalathath]] || [[word:lalathaj|lalathaj]] || [[word:lalathash|lalathash]] || [[word:lalatha|lalatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lalafthath|lalafthath]] || [[word:lalafthaj|lalafthaj]] || [[word:lalafthash|lalafthash]] || [[word:lalafthaf|lalafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lalathatha|lalathatha]] || [[word:lalathaja|lalathaja]] || [[word:lalathasha|lalathasha]] || [[word:lalathaka|lalathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lalathath|lalathath]] || [[word:lalathaj|lalathaj]] || [[word:lalathash|lalathash]] || [[word:lalatha|lalatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lalathathal|lalathathal]] || [[word:lalathajal|lalathajal]] || [[word:lalathashal|lalathashal]] || [[word:lalathakal|lalathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lalathathatha|lalathathatha]] || [[word:lalathajaja|lalathajaja]] || [[word:lalathashasha|lalathashasha]] || [[word:lalathaka|lalathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lalathathan|lalathathan]] || [[word:lalathajan|lalathajan]] || [[word:lalathashan|lalathashan]] || [[word:lalathakan|lalathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lalathathaoro|lalathathaoro]] || [[word:lalathajaoro|lalathajaoro]] || [[word:lalathashaoro|lalathashaoro]] || [[word:lalathakaoro|lalathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
